Header file for declaring the I2C class constructor in the JerryScript mbed drivers.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines an interface for integrating I2C functionality with the JerryScript engine in an mbed environment. It includes a preprocessor directive to prevent multiple inclusions of the file, ensuring that the compiler processes it only once. The file includes the `wrap_tools.h` header from the `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry`, which likely provides tools for wrapping C/C++ functions for use in JerryScript. The `DECLARE_CLASS_CONSTRUCTOR(I2C);` macro is used to declare a constructor for the I2C class, facilitating the creation of I2C objects within the JerryScript environment.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `jerryscript-mbed-library-registry/wrap_tools.h`
